member.name: M:MirrorNode.#ctor(BaseNodeAddress,ExecutorService)
member.param: the node address as a managed node address

member.param: the node address as a string

member.name: M:MirrorNode.GetRestBaseUrl
member.summary: Build the REST base URL for this mirror node.
